title: FarmZ
description: Farming features like golden crops and a beethuut!
body:
![Headline](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31479820fc65e2a692ee2941cb3398ca84889fa0.png)
[](https://discord.gg/cV4cJyGXqF) [](https://globox1997.github.io/wiki/mods/FarmZ/) [](https://github.com/Globox1997/FarmZ/issues)


This mod adds farming features like golden crops which can be grown while wearing a farmers hat. There is a certain chance when wearing this hat that the crop will be golden to obtain high quality food. By default the mod reduces the range of water moisture range to 0! This can be changed via the config. To moisture farmland you will either need to use the provided water cans or a sprinkler. A new creature was found, the Beethuut! Made by the legend Graus [https://x.com/_Graus](https://x.com/_Graus) ![showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85ef6a686f4666f69a9fd907774725ec0f5f1b46_0.webp)

[](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) This mod is developed for Fabric. There are no plans to develop a Forge version. Modpack Permission: Feel free to use it in any modpacks. Bug Report: Just report bugs at the github page.
